programme.title: Bharat
programme.desc: An eight-year-old boy makes a vow to his father that he will keep his family together no matter what happens, a promise that he works hard to keep over the next 60 years of his life.

programme.title: Pure Bollywood
programme.desc: Some of the best soundtracks of Bollywood uncut.

programme.title: Commando 3
programme.desc: Commando Karan Singh Dogra and Inspector Bhavna Reddy race against time to thwart a terror attack. However, they soon realise that cracking mastermind Buraq's conspiracy could be more difficult than they imagined.

programme.title: Raaste Ka Patthar
programme.desc: Jai allows his boss as well as superiors to use his flat at night to have flings with women. He meets Nita and falls in love, but later realises that she will marry his employer.

programme.title: Jagruti
programme.desc: Vishal is brutally killed in the presence of his younger brother, Jugnu. Jugnu is grown up now and he must avenge his brother's death, but he is alone, and has an uphill task.

programme.title: Mard
programme.desc: Azad, a wealthy prosperous king, is locked in a dungeon by General Dyer who wants to take over his kingdom. Years later, Azad's son comes to his father's rescue and puts an end to Dyer's tyranny.

programme.title: Jawaani Jaaneman
programme.desc: A 40 year-old playboy's life turns upside down when he comes to know that he has a 20-something-year-old daughter. Not only has he gained a daughter, but also soon a grandchild.

programme.title: Singh Is King
programme.desc: Happy Singh is a villager who goes through a chain of misadventures that lead him to become the King of the underworld. He falls in love with Sonia, who hates criminals.

programme.title: Mard Ko Dard Nahi Hota
programme.desc: Surya has a lifelong condition that renders him unable to feel or register pain. Soon, he decides to learn martial arts and use his abilities to help his biggest idol.

programme.title: Manikarnika: The Queen of Jhansi
programme.desc: Manikarnika - Queen of Jhansi or well known as Lakshmi Bai of Jhansi is her real live story. She was the first woman in history to fight against the British in the cry of Independence.

programme.title: Pure Bollywood
programme.desc: Some of the best soundtracks of Bollywood uncut.

programme.title: The Tashkent Files
programme.desc: A journalist investigates the mysterious death of India's second prime minister.

programme.title: Khushboo
programme.desc: Kusum and Brindavan love each other and hope to get married when they grow up, but fate intervenes and they are separated. They are brought together again by a chance meeting years later.

programme.title: Yeh Hai Jalwa
programme.desc: Things don't exactly go to plan when Raj Saxena visits his long lost father in London.

programme.title: Nikka Zaildar
programme.desc: A man's scheme to marry a reluctant fellow student comes with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Detective Shivaji
programme.desc: Shivaji, a policeman, sets out to investigate a high-profile murder of a minister's son. However, while pursuing the leads, he must also deal with his own wife's death.

programme.title: Aatma: Feel It Around You.
programme.desc: A single mother fights against the supernatural in order to hold on to her daughter.

programme.title: Leader
programme.desc: Rebellious law student Vijay Khanna boldly criticises the government, flirts with beautiful woman and invites trouble wherever he goes. But when he is accused of the brutal assassination of a politician, his world is flipped upside down.

programme.title: Yaadon Ki Baarat
programme.desc: Three brothers are separated after the brutal murder of their parents. Years pass before their professional lives take them to the same hotel.

programme.title: Harjeeta
programme.desc: A young man from a poor, dysfunctional home dreams of winning the World Cup in field hockey.

programme.title: Dil Dhadakne Do
programme.desc: On a cruise to celebrate their parents' 30th wedding anniversary, a brother and sister deal with the impact of family considerations on their romantic lives.

programme.title: Rowdy Rakshak
programme.desc: A special agent is assigned to protect the Indian prime minister who later gets assassinated. Following this, he is tasked with finding the man or group responsible for the assassination.

programme.title: Saand Ki Aankh
programme.desc: Both over the age of 60, Chandro Tomar and Prakashi Tomar inspire other women in India when they demonstrate their expert sharpshooting skills.

programme.title: Gupt
programme.desc: The day after a heated argument between a son and his father, the father is found dead, and the son is given a life sentence, but he manages to break out of prison and sets out to find his father's true murderer.

programme.title: Parmanu: The Story of Pokhran
programme.desc: A dedicated government official puts his career in jeopardy by insisting that India become a nuclear power, a goal that powerful forces resist.

programme.title: Geeta Mera Naam
programme.desc: Four children, 2 sons & twin daughters are separated from each other by fate. They meet as grown ups only to find that one of them is arrested by his own brother under false murder case.

programme.title: Sabse Bada Rupaiya
programme.desc: Multi-millionaire Amit Rai was warned by an associate of his generous ways. When he loses all of his wealth and money, all of those he helped choose to abandon him. He becomes a fisherman and soon discovers that his financial ruin was a deliberate and deceptive plot.

programme.title: Jabariya Jodi
programme.desc: A thug helps kidnap grooms in order to avoid paying out dowries for their upcoming marriage.

programme.title: No Problem
programme.desc: A bank owner faces financial ruin after a robbery. He sets out to apprehend those responsible, but despite locating the villains, things are not that simple.

programme.title: Hacked
programme.desc: Sameera's boyfriend disappoints her on her birthday and she ends up sleeping with Vivek, her neighbour. However, when she rebuffs his love, Vivek hacks into everything and makes her life miserable.

programme.title: Jab Harry Met Sejal
programme.desc: A search for Sejal's engagement ring makes Harry understand love and relationships better, while Sejal experiences newfound freedom, security and solace in Harry's company.

programme.title: Talaash: The Hunt Begins
programme.desc: A high-profile vigilante works for a police officer seeks revenge on the three crime bosses who destroy his family and life by beheading his father and kidnapping his sister.

programme.title: Go Goa Gone
programme.desc: Three friends get invited to an underground rave party organised by the Russian mafia on a remote island. What ensues thereafter is a one of a kind adventure.

programme.title: Pyar Ka Mausam
programme.desc: A man learns that the people who raised him are not his biological parents.

programme.title: Lal Baadshah
programme.desc: Lal Singh, a messiah of the poor, bears an uncanny resemblance to a prince who was subjected to a tragedy in the past along with the rest of the royal family. The mystery gets solved, but he must encounter several enemies.

programme.title: Ab Insaf Hoga
programme.desc: A homeless woman struggles to earn money for her paralysed husband's treatment. She vows revenge from the miscreants who try to take advantage of her.

programme.title: Yaadein
programme.desc: When Ronit meets Isha, both are attracted to each other and fall in love. They want to surprise Ronit's parents and Raj, and they accordingly decide to share this news with Raj, only to find out that Raj has been actively involved in trying to get Ronit married to Monishka Rai.

programme.title: Dirty Politics
programme.desc: In order to gain power, Anokhi Devi blackmails and sleeps with a politician. However, when she goes missing, and the CBI step in to investigate.

programme.title: Samrat & Co.
programme.desc: A young, beautiful and rich girl, Dimpy Singh, approaches a private investigator, Samrat Tilakdhari, with a strange case.

programme.title: Judaai
programme.desc: A woman's relentless pursuit of wealth threatens her relationship with her husband.

programme.title: Iqbal
programme.desc: A young speech-and-hearing-impaired man has a dream to play cricket for his country. However, his father is set against it. Through the help of his resourceful sister he finds a coach and mentor.

programme.title: Deewaar
programme.desc: Two brothers who have grown up on different sides of the law find themselves headed for a showdown in modern-day India.

programme.title: Veer
programme.desc: A Pindari prince goes to England to study military tactics so that he can avenge his people. While there, he falls in love.

programme.title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
programme.desc: In his attempt to curb criminal activities in his area an honest police inspector gets into the bad books of two wrong-doers.

programme.title: The Xpose
programme.desc: Following an argument between Chandni and Zara, two actresses who loathe each other, the latter is found dead under mysterious circumstances. When the police accuse Chandni of the crime, it falls upon her lover Ravi to clear her name.

programme.title: Tanu Weds Manu Returns
programme.desc: Four years in, and a couples' marriage collapses. But what happens when one of them meets a look-a-like of the other?

programme.title: The Tashkent Files
programme.desc: A journalist investigates the mysterious death of India's second prime minister.

programme.title: Sarfarosh
programme.desc: A medical student quits school to fight terrorists after an attack leaves his brother dead and his father injured.

programme.title: Article 15
programme.desc: Based on the socio-political situation of India, the lives of police officers are followed. In a country where discrimination is everywhere, whether related to race or caste, the officers embark on a journey of acceptance and change.

programme.title: Johny Mera Naam
programme.desc: Two brothers get separated in childhood. Years later one becomes a CIA agent.

programme.title: Nehlle Pe Dehlla
programme.desc: Two small-time crooks blackmail a hotel manager who has committed fraud.

programme.title: Joggers' Park
programme.desc: Justice Jatin Chatterjee, a retired judge, meets Jenny, a glamorous hotel executive and model, while walking in the park. Jenny has a sad history in love and is happy single. Mr Chatterjee is a well-respected celebrity who believes one shouldn't fall in love but rise in it. At first Jenny isn't interested, and their relationship develops as friendship, but as it changes, the judge is afraid of the consequences.

programme.title: Chhoriya Chhoron Se Kam Nahi Hoti
programme.desc: A young girl struggles to achieve her dream to become an IPS officer due to the opposition from her conservative father.

programme.title: Cocktail
programme.desc: Two best friends, who are complete opposites, are mixed up in a love triangle that extends from London to Cape Town.

programme.title: Main Tera Hero
programme.desc: A mischievous collegian believes that Krishna sent him a beautiful woman to woo.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: A ruthless gangster who will kill anyone for money is attracted to a middle-class girl. However, she does not approve of his work and wishes for him to change.

programme.title: Hello Darling
programme.desc: Three harassed female employees fear they have killed their boss who is very much alive, and try to dispose of the dead body of an unknown male.

programme.title: Tumse Achha Kaun Hai
programme.desc: A spoiled brat proves to be a match for an equally spoiled playboy.

programme.title: Saajan Ki Bahon Mein
programme.desc: Fate separates Sagar from his love Sapna.Years later both meet and announce that they`re getting engaged to someone else. However, some truths change their lives forever.

programme.title: Karan Arjun
programme.desc: When twin brothers are killed by their uncle, their mother prays that the god Kali will bring back her sons, so that they can avenge the family. Seventeen years later she discovers that her prayer has been answered.

programme.title: Rang
programme.desc: A perplexed father has to decide on the fate of his daughters, as they are both in love with the same man.

programme.title: A Flying Jatt
programme.desc: A reluctant superhero fights crime and protects people. He meets his match with an evil man, whom he must vanquish to save the day.

programme.title: Tigers
programme.desc: Ayan, a pharmaceutical salesman in Pakistan, takes on the multinational health care corporation he works for after he realizes they knowingly marketed a baby formula that's responsible for the death of hundreds of babies everyday.

programme.title: Satyagraha
programme.desc: A son who yearns for a father and his father grieves for his lost son. A young woman has forgotten how to love and an ambitious rabble-rouser are all embroiled in this story.

programme.title: Pure Bollywood
programme.desc: Some of the best soundtracks of Bollywood uncut.

programme.title: 1920 London
programme.desc: When her wealthy husband becomes possessed by a mysterious locket, a desperate woman turns to her forbidden former lover who happens to be an expert of the occult.

programme.title: Bairaag
programme.desc: A wealthy man is betrayed by his servant - what will the consequences of her actions be?

programme.title: Suhaag
programme.desc: College pals Ajay and Raj always play pranks on each other and then get into trouble. One day, Ajay needs his birth certificate for his passport, but he is shocked to find out his real name.

programme.title: Jatt & Juliet
programme.desc: Fateh Singh, who wants to marry a Canadian, meets Pooja, who wants to study in Canada. Though they don't get along initially, they soon find themselves drawn to each other.

programme.title: English Vinglish
programme.desc: A housewife enrols in an English-speaking course to stop her husband and daughter mocking her lack of English skills, and gains self-respect in the process.

programme.title: Raazi
programme.desc: During the Indo-Pakistan War of 1971, an Indian spy is married into a Pakistani family by her father so that she can get some valuable information about the enemy.

programme.title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
programme.desc: Ramkishen and his wife Mamta have three sons. Prem and Vinod have sweethearts in Preeti and Vivek marries Sangeeta. Since Vivek is Mamta's step-son, she plots to alienate him, but will she succeed?

programme.title: Pure Bollywood
programme.desc: Some of the best soundtracks of Bollywood uncut.

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: A corrupt East Indian police officer embarks on a path of righteousness.

programme.title: Pavitra Papi
programme.desc: A man befriends a destitute woman whose husband is missing.

programme.title: Akele Hum Akele Tum
programme.desc: A middle-class singer and a wealthy woman fall in love and intend to marry, but her parents will not allow it. However, she is adamant, and the marriage takes place, but after she gives birth, they end up falling out.

programme.title: Jatt & Juliet
programme.desc: Fateh Singh, who wants to marry a Canadian, meets Pooja, who wants to study in Canada. Though they don't get along initially, they soon find themselves drawn to each other.

programme.title: God Tussi Great Ho
programme.desc: A young TV anchor has been trying to be successful in his career, but it has always eluded him. He only blames God for this. He is also head over heels in love with a beautiful woman, who is also a TV anchor and a well-known star working in the same channel, but he has never been able to express his love for her.

programme.title: Saina
programme.desc: The story of Saina Nehwal, a professional badminton player who once ranked number one in the sport.

programme.title: Toilet: Ek Prem Katha
programme.desc: A woman leaves her husband on the first day of their marriage after discovering that he doesn't have a toilet. He desperately sets out on a mission to win back his love by standing up to the age-old traditions and values of India.

programme.title: Singh is Bling
programme.desc: Tired of his ways, a son's father gives him two options, marry a girl, or work with his friend in Goa. The son chooses the latter.

programme.title: Buddha Mar Gaya
programme.desc: Laxmikant Kabadiya and his twin sister, Prerna, have made it to the top from the very bottom, and now -- as they are about to land their greatest windfall of all -- an untimely and messy family death spoils their plans.

programme.title: Haqeeqat
programme.desc: Though hampered by hunger, fatigue and cold, a brave group of soldiers protects India's border from Chinese forces.

programme.title: Toofan
programme.desc: Toofan is a superhero using his crossbow as a weapon, while his twin brother Shyam is a magician. Toofan helps people in distress, and is looking to find the murderer of his father.

programme.title: Koyla
programme.desc: A woman who was tricked into marriage falls in love with her evil husband's mute servant, and is locked in a room while her husband tries to get rid of her lover.

programme.title: Amavas
programme.desc: A young couple is hunted by dark forces in a palatial mansion.

programme.title: Judgemental Hai Kya
programme.desc: When a landlord meets her new tenants, a young married couple, their perfectly normal life leaves her really curious. But then a murder takes place and she suspects they have a role to play in the crime.

programme.title: Impatient Vivek
programme.desc: Rejected by the woman he loves, a slacker abducts her shortly before her marriage with another male.

programme.title: Delhi Belly
programme.desc: Three unsuspecting, average guys find themselves on the hit list of one of India's most powerful crime syndicates.

programme.title: Dhobi Ghat
programme.desc: A movie that shows you vibrant Mumbai and the colourful people who live here form different points of view.

programme.title: Sawan Ko Aane Do
programme.desc: A village boy with singing talent is encouraged by his love Chandrika and fights to win her father's approval.

programme.title: Jazbaa
programme.desc: Tensions arise when the daughter of the nation's best lawyer is kidnapped. Now she has to save a criminal from a death sentence as ransom.

programme.title: Jaanwar
programme.desc: An adopted boy named Badshah grows up to be a criminal and is pursued by Inspector Pradhan. After committing murder Badshah goes into hiding with a child, but can he leave the past behind?

programme.title: Players
programme.desc: A group of thieves, including an illusionist, a computer hacker, a wannabe actor and an explosives expert, plan a robbery. But destinty could have something else in store for them.

programme.title: Ragini MMS 2
programme.desc: A film crew arrives at the haunted house and experiences horrible and creepy events.

programme.title: Jism
programme.desc: When an unemployed man falls for a wealthy woman and he is willing to do whatever he must to get her away from her abusive husband.

programme.title: Fitoor
programme.desc: A poor but talented Kashmiri boy is hired as a stable-keeper and becomes infatuated with his employer's daughter. When the employer notices. she demands the boy become successful in order to win the daughter's love. The boy grows up to be one of India's most successful young artists, but his old employer still stands between him and her daughter.

programme.title: Toonpur Ka Super Hero
programme.desc: Cartoon land - Toonpur, is in trouble when the good guys - Devtoons are constantly at war with the bad guys - Toonasurs.

programme.title: Daddy
programme.desc: The true story of Arun Gawli, who rises from poverty to become one of India's most notable gangsters, feared by some and revered by others as a modern-day Robin Hood. Hungry for more power and influence, he launches a career in politics.

programme.title: Saudagar
programme.desc: Moti marries Mahjubhi whom he exploits to make enough money, before divorcing her to marry another girl he loves. Can Moti survive without Mahjubhi?

programme.title: Shubh Mangal Savdhan
programme.desc: A couple falls in love and gets married, but the groom discovers that he suffers from erectile dysfunction.

programme.title: Aarzoo
programme.desc: A love triangle occurs when a woman's father wants her to marry someone else. She must choose which man she wants to marry.

programme.title: Pyar Kiya To Darna Kya
programme.desc: Muskaan's over-protective brother, Vishal, does not approve of her love for Suraj. Will Suraj be able to convince Vishal of his true love for her?

programme.title: Desi Boys
programme.desc: Two friends, one an ambitious and successful romantic, and the other, a laid-back charmer, find themselves in a difficult situation during the recession. To resolve their financial problems, they resort to being male escorts.

programme.title: Blank
programme.desc: A doctor contacts the chief of an anti-terrorism squad when he discovers a timed bomb fixed to the body of an accident victim who has amnesia.

programme.title: Nh10
programme.desc: On a road trip to a luxurious hotel, a loving couple witnesses a brutal honour killing of a young boy and girl.

programme.title: Kaun Kitney Paani Mein
programme.desc: The residents of Upri and Bairi, who have opposed each other for many years decide to resolve the issues between them after a severe water scarcity hits the village of Upri.

programme.title: Gadar: Ek Prem Katha
programme.desc: A Sikh trucker and an aristocratic Muslim woman fall in love against the backdrop of the 1947 partition.

programme.title: Honeymoon
programme.desc: Best friends Neelu and Madhu both agree that men are not trustworthy, and as such decide to dump their boyfriends.

programme.title: Bombay
programme.desc: Racial tensions threaten the lives of a Hindu and his Muslim wife who have moved to Bombay to start a new life together.

programme.title: Mohra
programme.desc: A journalist comes to the aid of a murderer with a life sentence when she makes an appeal in court and although he is given his freedom, they soon discover that there is a grim reason behind his release.

programme.title: Nirdosh
programme.desc: Arbaaz Khan plays the role of the investigating officer in a murder case in which Manjari Fadnnis emerges as the prime suspect and is arrested. However, as events unfold, many possibilities and suspects come to the fore.

programme.title: Dream Girl
programme.desc: Karamveer gets a job at call centre due to his ability to talk in a woman's voice. He garners a big fan following but soon gets in trouble with his overzealous clients.

programme.title: Sanam Teri Kasam
programme.desc: After cheating many women, a playboy, finally falls in love with a woman. However, the situation gets bizarre when she is tricked into marrying none other than the man's best friend.

programme.title: Singh Is King
programme.desc: Happy Singh is a villager who goes through a chain of misadventures that lead him to become the King of the underworld. He falls in love with Sonia, who hates criminals.

programme.title: Raja Rani Ko Chahiye Pasina
programme.desc: Movie starring Sushant Ray, Durga, Jasraj and directed by Sulabha Deshpande.

programme.title: Baharon Ke Sapne
programme.desc: Bholanath is worker who lives with his wife Gauri in a small town near Bombay. Times are hard and due to the crisis, Bholanath looses his job, pushing their son to look for alternative work.
